tasks.name: Discovery
tasks.description: Clarify scope, identify risk, and prepare the delivery baseline.

children.name: Stakeholder interviews
children.description: Interview sponsors and operators to confirm requirements and constraints.

children.name: Solution outline
children.description: Draft the technical shape, delivery phases, and milestone plan.

tasks.name: Implementation
tasks.description: Build the approved scope and verify it against the release criteria.

children.name: Backend services
children.description: Implement APIs, orchestration, and deployment support.

children.name: Frontend workflows
children.description: Ship the operator screens and user-facing polish for launch.

children.name: Go-live review
children.description: Decision point for release readiness and launch approval.
